    A

    AAppc - Klasse in de.btu.kt.syx.util
    Base class of console-based apps.

    AAppc.CommandNotAcceptedException - Ausnahmeklasse in de.btu.kt.syx.util
    Thrown by command handlers if they do not accept the UI command.
    AAppc.ErrorReport - Klasse in de.btu.kt.syx.util
    An error report containing an error counter and a list of error messages.

    Demonstrates how to add parameter information.

    Adds parameter information to a parameter.

    Adds system exclusive data structs to this message.

    Adds a system exclusive message listener to this MIDI interface.

    Adds a SysEx message listener to this recorder.

    AMidiMonitor - Klasse in de.btu.kt.syx.util
    Instances of this class can be registered with MidiInterfaces in order to receive a log of MIDI input and output.

    Creates a new MIDI monitor.
